mapper.nql: DELETE EDGE `${re.edgeName}` ${re.properties}${re.rank};
INSERT EDGE `${re.edgeName}` (${re.entityProperties}) VALUES "${re.subjectId}"->"${re.objectId}" ${re.rank}:(${re.entityValue});
INSERT EDGE `${re.edgeName}` (${re.entityProperties}) VALUES "${re.subjectId}"->"${re.objectId}" :(${re.entityValue});
INSERT EDGE `${re.edgeName}` (${re.entityProperties}) VALUES ${re.entityPropertiesBath};
MATCH (v:`${tagName}`) RETURN v;
MATCH ()-[e:${er.edgeName}]->() RETURN e SKIP ${ er.current } LIMIT ${ er.pageSize };
MATCH ()-[e]->() RETURN e;
FETCH PROP ON `${re.edgeName}` "${re.subjectId}" -> "${re.objectId}" ${re.rank} YIELD edge as e;
FETCH PROP ON `${edgeName}` ${entity} YIELD edge as e;
UPDATE EDGE ON `${re.edgeName}` "${re.subjectId}" -> "${re.objectId}" SET ${re.entityProperties}
INSERT EDGE `${re.edgeName}` () VALUES ${re.value};
MATCH (v)-[e:`${edgeName}`]->(v1) WHERE 1 == 1 AND properties(v).NAME IS NOT NULL AND properties(v1).NAME IS NOT NULL RETURN labels(v) AS t
MATCH (v)-[e:`${edgeName}`]->(v1) WHERE 1 == 1 AND properties(v).NAME IS NOT NULL AND properties(v1).NAME IS NOT NULL RETURN labels(v) AS t,labels(v1) AS t1
MATCH (v)-[e:`${edgeName}`]->(v1) WHERE 1 == 1 AND properties(v).NAME IS NOT NULL AND properties(v1).NAME IS NOT NULL RETURN labels(v1) AS t
GO 1 STEPS from ${entityId} OVER * BIDIRECT YIELD DISTINCT dst(edge) as dst, src(edge) as src ,type(edge) as edgeName,properties(edge) as property,rank(edge) as rank;
